zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John 'The White Knight' de Erleigh, VI於1332年11月29日出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特度斯東時，他的父親Sir Nicholas Zouche55歲，母親Elizabeth of Wokingham24歲。他和Margaret de Brienne至少有4個兒子。他去世於1394年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特貝金頓 煙雨 斯坦德維其可享年62歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Erleigh,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Earley
meanings: English and Irish (Leitrim and Tyrone): variant of   Early  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: 'The
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Dorothea  , also used independently.

nameMeanings.name: Knight'
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: status or occupational name from Middle English knight ‘retainer, attendant’ (Old English cniht ‘boy, youth, lad)’. The specialized feudal sense ‘a high-ranking tenant bound to serve his lord as a mounted soldier’ is not known to have ever given rise to the surname, although it is not out of the question that it may occasionally have been used as a nickname, perhaps for someone who played the part of an armed knight in a local pageant.
Irish: sometimes adopted for Gaelic Mac an Ridire ‘son of the knight’. See also McKnight .

variants.name: Knights
meanings: English (East Anglia): variant of Knight , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: McKnight
meanings: Irish: part translation of Gaelic Mac an Ridire ‘son of the horseman (Gaelic ridire)’, formerly Anglicized McRuddery.
Scottish (Dumfriesshire and Galloway) and Irish (Ulster): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Neachtain, which is usually Anglicized as McNaughton .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John 'The White Knight' de Erleigh, VI was born on 29 November 1332, in Durston, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Nicholas Zouche, was 55 and his mother, Elizabeth of Wokingham, was 24. He had at least 4 sons with Margaret de Brienne. He died in 1394, in Beckington with Standerwick, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62.

Il a eu au moins 4 fils avec Margaret de Brienne. Il est décédé en 1394, à Beckington with Standerwick, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John 'The White Knight' de Erleigh, VI am 29. November 1332 in Durston, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Nicholas Zouche 55 und seine Mutter Elizabeth of Wokingham 24. Er hatte mit Margaret de Brienne mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1394 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Beckington with Standerwick, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

ko.Beckington, Frome, Somerset, England: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 베킨그턴 위스 스탠더윅
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John 'The White Knight' de Erleigh, VI(이)가 1332년 11월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 뒤르스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Nicholas Zouche(은)는 55세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth of Wokingham(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Margaret de Brienne(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1394년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 베킨그턴 위스 스탠더윅에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

У него было по крайней мере 4 сына от Margaret de Brienne. Он умер в 1394 г. в местности беккингтон вит стандирвикк, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет.
